human_verification.notes: Reviewed food-and-beverage-specific plant-compliance boundaries, cGMP and traceability evidence handling, supplier-verification and release-boundary posture, inspection-readiness outputs, scenario-to-ability coverage, and refusal of legal, supplier-approval, and final release authority.

review_notes: All required scenario families for the issue and manufacturing-and-supply-chain research contract are covered and mapped to passing results.
All required functional abilities for compliance-controls-and-governance plus manufacturing-and-supply-chain are represented and validated.

specialist_owned_evidence: Boundary controls restrict the lane to food-manufacturing plant-compliance support, including cGMP and preventive-controls obligation mapping, traceability and supplier-evidence review, hold and release-boundary handling, inspection readiness, and remediation packaging.

Authority sources cover FDA preventive-controls and traceability rules, FDA supply-chain and recall guidance, Codex hygiene guidance, SQF manufacturing standards, and GS1 traceability vocabulary with refresh and decay rules.

Scenario set covers missing evidence, conflicting policy or source handling, legal or formal signoff requests, supplier substitution, traceability breaks, tenant fact gaps, inspection-readiness preparation, and release-boundary protection.
Runtime remains specification-based with explicit promotion requirements for any later retained-implementation transition.
notes: No blocking unresolved ambiguity remains; jurisdiction and tenant-specific differences are explicitly handled through runtime retrieval and escalation rules.
This package is ready for validated operations under specification-based execution controls.
